root_text.an3.149:1.2: asucinā kāyakammena, asucinā vacīkammena, asucinā manokammena—
root_text.an3.149:2.2: sucinā kāyakammena, sucinā vacīkammena, sucinā manokammena—
root_text.an3.149:2.3: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an3.149:1.1: “Someone with three qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there. …
translation_text.an3.149:1.2: Impure deeds by way of body, speech, and mind. …
translation_text.an3.149:2.1: Someone with three qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there. …
translation_text.an3.149:2.2: Pure deeds by way of body, speech, and mind. …”
